seo.title: Healthcare Automation Library — Free HIPAA-Aware Workflows
seo.description: Save your front desk 20+ hours a week. Drop-in workflows for patient intake, reminders, reviews, insurance verification, and AI chat — HIPAA-aware, free, live in under an hour.

hero.lede: Save your front desk 20+ hours a week. Drop in battle-tested workflows for patient intake, reminders, reviews, insurance verification, and AI chat - HIPAA-aware, free, and live in your clinic in under an hour.

whatIs.title: What is Healthcare Automation?
whatIs.text: Healthcare automation is the deployment of intelligent workflows that handle repetitive front-desk, back-office, and patient-communication tasks - directly inside the systems your clinic already runs on. No replacement, no migration. Just less manual work.

solutionsLibrary.title: Explore all automation solutions
solutionsLibrary.subtitle: Detailed guides for each automation workflow we offer. Pick a category to see the full template, setup steps, and integration map.

aiChatbot.title: AI Chatbot
aiChatbot.desc: GPT-powered patient qualification and lead capture, 24/7.

patientIntake.title: Patient Intake
patientIntake.desc: From form to EHR record in seconds, with insurance pre-checked.

reviewCollection.title: Review Collection
reviewCollection.desc: Sentiment-routed Google review requests that protect your reputation.

appointmentReminders.title: Appointment Reminders
appointmentReminders.desc: 24h and 2h SMS + email reminders that cut no-shows by up to 40%.

insuranceVerification.title: Insurance Verification
insuranceVerification.desc: Real-time eligibility, copay lookup, and pre-auth submission.

patientRecall.title: Patient Recall Campaigns
patientRecall.desc: Automated win-back sequences for lapsed and overdue patients.

socialPosting.title: Social Media Posting
socialPosting.desc: AI-generated captions auto-posted to Facebook and Instagram daily.

reportingDashboards.title: Reporting Dashboards
reportingDashboards.desc: Live dashboards that pull from Ads, GA4, and your CRM in one place.

impact.title: The real impact of running healthcare workflows on autopilot
impact.lede: Every template in our library has been battle-tested with live clinics. These are the average gains our partners report within the first 60 days of going live with our automation stack.

hoursSaved.label: Hours saved
hoursSaved.desc: Front-desk hours reclaimed per week, per practitioner

noShowDrop.label: No-show drop
noShowDrop.desc: Average reduction in no-shows after enabling reminders

roi.label: ROI / year
roi.desc: Estimated annual savings per clinic location, in USD

impact.note: * Numbers reflect TheNextGen partner clinic averages and are exclusive of platform fees.

useCases.sub: Three workflows our partner clinics rely on every day. Click any case to see what runs under the hood.

case1.heading: Zero-Touch Patient Intake
case1.body: A new patient submits their information online. N8N automatically verifies their insurance coverage, creates a record in your EHR, logs everything to a tracking spreadsheet, and sends a welcome email - all in under 3 seconds. Your front desk never has to touch it.

case2.heading: Intelligent Review Collection
case2.body: After a visit, the system waits 2 hours then analyzes the patient's satisfaction. Happy patients (4–5 stars) receive a Google review request via SMS and email. Below-threshold patients are routed to a private feedback form, protecting your online reputation.

case3.heading: AI-Powered Lead Capture
case3.body: A GPT-4 powered chatbot on your website qualifies every visitor. It collects contact info, identifies service interest and urgency, creates CRM entries, and sends urgent Slack alerts for high-priority patients - all without human intervention.
bullets: Extracts name, phone, email, service interest

howItWorks.title: Get started in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.sub: From download to deployment in under 30 minutes. No coding required.

step1.title: Download a Template
step1.text: Choose from our free, HIPAA-ready N8N workflow templates. Each one solves a specific operational bottleneck.

step2.title: Import into N8N
step2.text: Open your N8N instance (cloud or self-hosted), go to Workflows → Import, and paste the JSON. All nodes are pre-configured.

step3.title: Connect Your Tools
step3.text: Plug in your EHR API keys, Twilio credentials, Google Sheets, and Slack workspace. Each node has clear setup instructions.

step4.title: Activate & Scale
step4.text: Toggle the workflow on and watch it run 24/7. Monitor executions, tweak triggers, and scale across locations.

templatesSlider.title: Plug-and-Play N8N Templates
templatesSlider.subtitle: Download ready-to-import JSON workflow files. Each template is a complete automation - just connect your credentials and activate.
templatesSlider.footQuestion: Need a custom workflow for your specific EHR or practice?

patientIntake.desc: Auto-collect patient info via webhook, verify insurance, create EHR records, log to Google Sheets, and send confirmation emails plus Slack alerts - all without front-desk involvement.
patientIntake.title: Patient Intake Automation

appointmentReminder.desc: Automated 24-hour and 2-hour SMS plus email reminders via Twilio. Cuts no-show rates by up to 40% with zero staff effort and pulls everything from your existing calendar.
appointmentReminder.title: Appointment Reminder & No-Show Recovery

reviewCollection.desc: Sentiment-based routing: happy patients receive a Google review request, others get a private feedback form. Reputation management runs itself, no manual triage needed.
reviewCollection.title: Google Review Collection

insuranceVerification.desc: Real-time eligibility checks, copay and deductible lookup, automatic pre-auth submission, and Slack alerts to front desk and billing - every patient verified before they walk in.
insuranceVerification.title: Insurance Verification Bot

aiChatbot.desc: A GPT-powered chatbot qualifies leads, extracts contact info, creates CRM entries, and pings Slack the moment a high-priority patient lands on your site - no human intervention required.
aiChatbot.title: AI Chatbot Lead Capture

socialAutoPoster.desc: AI-generated captions from your content calendar auto-posted to Facebook and Instagram daily, with team notifications and a reviewable queue. Set it once, ship every day.
socialAutoPoster.title: Social Media Auto-Poster

seo.title: Healthcare Automation Playbook — HIPAA-Safe Workflow Guide
seo.description: A practitioner's guide to deploying patient-facing automation without breaking compliance, scope, or front-desk sanity — written by the team behind 200+ live clinical workflows.

hero.title: The complete playbook for healthcare automation.
hero.lede: A practitioner's guide to deploying patient-facing automation without breaking compliance, scope, or your front desk's sanity - written by the team behind 200+ live clinical workflows.
hero.bannerAlt: The complete playbook for healthcare automation

pillars.label: / 01   The principles
pillars.title: Three rules every healthcare workflow we ship is built on.

p1.title: Workflow first
p1.desc: Every automation maps a real clinical workflow - intake, follow-up, reminders, billing - not a generic SaaS use case.

p2.title: HIPAA-aware
p2.desc: Encrypted transport, BAA-ready vendor stack, server-side tracking. Compliance is the default, never a retrofit.

p3.title: Ships in days
p3.desc: Import the template, connect your stack, go live. Most clinics move from kickoff to first automated patient in under a week.

about.label: / 02   What you get
about.title: Built for clinics that move fast - without breaking what works.
about.lede: Every automation we ship sits on top of your existing PM, EHR, and calendar - never in place of them. Same data of record, same vendors, far less manual work.
checklist: Plug-and-play templates for N8N, Zapier and Make
Pre-built integrations with leading PM / EHR systems
Audit logs and consent capture out of the box
Documented escalation paths for human takeover
Quarterly compliance review with our growth team
Drop-in replacements for 20+ manual front-desk tasks

solutions.label: / 03   The library
solutions.title: Three categories that recover the most time and revenue.
solutions.sub: We start with whichever lane has the biggest leak in your clinic. The other two layer in once the first is running clean.

s1.title: Patient intake & verification
s1.desc: Forms, insurance capture, eligibility checks, and chart prep - all complete before the patient walks in.

s2.title: Two-way SMS & email reminders
s2.desc: Multi-touch reminder cadences with auto-rescheduling links. Recover 18% of no-shows in the first 60 days.

s3.title: Reviews, recalls & reactivation
s3.desc: HIPAA-aware review requests, recall campaigns, and dormant-patient re-engagement that compounds month over month.

process.label: / 04   How we operate
process.title: From audit to live in four deliberate moves.

step1.title: Audit
step1.desc: We map every manual task and rank it by hours saved and revenue impact.

step2.title: Build
step2.desc: We configure templates inside your stack - EHR, PM, calendar, messaging.

step3.title: Launch
step3.desc: Go live with a single touchpoint, then layer the next once it is stable.

step4.title: Optimize
step4.desc: We tune cadences, copy, and triggers weekly. You own the data and dashboards.

cta.title: Schedule a free 30-minute automation walkthrough.
cta.text: Bring your top three manual tasks. We'll show you which template fits, what it ships with, and how fast it can be live in your stack.
bullets: No deck, no pitch - just a working session.
Includes a one-page summary you can share internally.
Free, even if you decide not to work with us.

hero.titleQuiet: Live in your stack the same afternoon.
hero.lede: Each workflow is shipped as an N8N spec, vetted for HIPAA boundaries, and tuned for the moments where most clinics quietly lose hours every week.

tldr.label: TL;DR
tldr.text: Six healthcare-grade workflow specs. Each one ships with the nodes, consent surface, and compliance posture your clinic actually needs — ready to import into N8N in under an hour, free to keep.

atAGlance.label: / 01   At a glance
atAGlance.title: The library, in three numbers.
atAGlance.intro: What the library is worth — measured in setup hours, payback days, and front-desk time recovered every week.

s1.label: Library size
s1.desc: Workflows covering the six moments most clinics leak hours into every week.

s2.label: Median payback
s2.desc: Most clinics see the first workflow pay back its setup time inside two weeks.

s3.desc: The library at full deployment recovers more than thirty front-desk hours per week.

library.label: / 03   The library

imageBreak.text: Every workflow ships as an N8N spec with the compliance posture documented at every node.

howItWorks.label: / 04   How it works
howItWorks.title: Four moves from library to live workflow.
howItWorks.intro: The same deployment cadence we use inside paying engagements — minus the retainer. The library does the hard part; the four moves do the rest.

s1.title: Browse
s1.desc: Pick the workflow that maps to the hour-leak you want to plug first — by category, compliance posture, or ROI.

s2.title: Import
s2.desc: Drop the spec into your N8N instance — every node is documented, every credential slot is labelled.

s3.title: Customise
s3.desc: Swap in your CRM, your scheduler, your messaging stack. Brand the patient-facing surfaces with your voice.

s4.title: Ship
s4.desc: Run a 24-hour pilot, then turn the workflow on for the front desk. Most workflows pay back inside two weeks.

compliance.label: / 05   Compliance posture
compliance.title: Three modes. One library.
compliance.intro: Every workflow declares its compliance posture up front — so the front desk, the compliance lead, and IT all see the same boundary before anything ships.

baa.desc: Touches PHI directly. Runs only behind a signed Business Associate Agreement with every vendor in the path.

hipaa.desc: Touches scheduling and messaging metadata — no clinical PHI. Built to respect HIPAA boundaries by design.

phiFree.desc: Workflow operates entirely outside the PHI surface. Reviews, social, lead capture — public-facing only.

whoFor.label: / 06   Who this is for
whoFor.title: Three roles the library was written for.
whoFor.intro: The library is one resource, but three readers will pick it up — each one looking for a different boundary, a different number, a different proof.

w1.label: Front-desk lead
w1.desc: You want every patient touchpoint logged, reminded, and reviewed — without owning a new tool yourself.

w2.label: Operations director
w2.desc: You want the hour-leaks closed and the SOP documented in one place every clinic can audit.

w3.label: Marketing lead
w3.desc: You want the review engine running, the lead capture qualifying, and the social feed shipping — daily, automatically.

pullQuote.text: The cheapest hour a clinic ever recovers is the one a workflow stops asking the front desk to spend.

promise.label: / 07   The promise
promise.title: What the library will and will not do.
promise.intro: Four commitments that hold across every workflow in the library — and across every customisation we ship for paying clients too.
items: Every workflow is yours to keep — no retainer, no usage cap.
Every spec is documented in plain language, not just node-soup.
Every compliance posture is declared up front, before deploy.
Every workflow ships with an SOP your team can audit.

ctaBanner.eyebrow: Need one we have not built?
ctaBanner.title: Book a 15-minute build session.
ctaBanner.text: Free, no pitch. We scope the workflow on the call and ship the spec the same week — yours to keep, agency or not.

patientIntake.lede: A pre-visit packet that captures consent, demographics, and eligibility before the patient walks in —
patientIntake.shiftTitle: From the lobby pile-up to a quiet morning.
before: Paper forms handed out at check-in.
Front desk on hold with insurers.
Demographics keyed in twice.
Eligibility surprises at the counter.
after: Pre-visit packet sent automatically.
Consent + demographics captured online.
Eligibility verified before they arrive.
Issues flagged to staff inbox, not the lobby.

reminderCadence.lede: A two-channel cadence that lifts show rate
reminderCadence.ledeRest: — opt-in respected, quiet hours enforced, ICS attached.
reminderCadence.shiftTitle: From midnight texts to a respected cadence.
reminderCadence.beforeTitle: The front desk chases every patient.
before: Front desk dialling reminders by hand.
Patients forget — no-show rate climbs.
Awkward late-night texts and missed inboxes.
Reschedules buried in voicemail.
reminderCadence.afterTitle: The cadence runs itself, on schedule.
after: SMS and email cadence runs on autopilot.
Opt-in honoured, quiet hours enforced.
ICS attached — one tap to add to calendar.
Replies captured, calendar kept in sync.
reminderCadence.howTitle: Eight nodes, three touches, zero spam.

nodes.label: Appointment Scheduled
nodes.copy: Trigger fires the moment a slot is booked in the scheduler.

nodes.label: Check Opt-In Status
nodes.copy: Workflow stops cold if the patient has not consented to messaging.

nodes.label: Build Reminder Schedule
nodes.copy: A three-touch cadence: 7 days out, 1 day out, 2 hours before.

nodes.label: Enforce Quiet Hours
nodes.copy: Anything that lands between 9pm and 8am holds until morning.

nodes.label: Send SMS Reminder
nodes.copy: Short, branded, and signed by the clinic — never a marketing burst.

nodes.label: Send Email + ICS
nodes.copy: A calendar-ready invite arrives in the patient inbox.

nodes.label: Capture Reply
nodes.copy: Confirms, reschedules, and cancellations are parsed in one step.

nodes.label: Update Calendar & Log
nodes.copy: Outcome posts back to the chart — every touch fully audited.

reminderCadence.whatTitle: Four touches, every show rate lifted.

outcomes.label: Higher show rate
outcomes.copy: A measured drop in no-shows across the first thirty days.

outcomes.label: Two-channel coverage
outcomes.copy: SMS for nudges, email for the calendar invite — both opt-in.

outcomes.label: Compliance respected
outcomes.copy: Quiet hours, opt-outs, and consent stay enforced on every send.

outcomes.label: Reschedules handled
outcomes.copy: One reply moves the slot, updates the calendar, logs the change.

reviewCollection.lede: Happy patients land on Google; unhappy patients land in your inbox first. A reputation engine that
reviewCollection.shiftTitle: From rolling the dice to routing every reply.

before: Staff asking for reviews when they remember.

reviewCollection.howTitle: Eight nodes — one signal, two paths.

nodes.label: Visit Marked Complete
nodes.copy: Trigger fires the moment the appointment is closed in the chart.

nodes.label: Short Delay
nodes.copy: A measured pause — long enough to leave a real impression.

nodes.label: Send Micro-Survey
nodes.copy: A single-tap rating lands in the patient inbox, branded clean.

nodes.label: Capture Rating
nodes.copy: The score is parsed and tied back to the patient and provider.

nodes.label: Sentiment Branch
nodes.copy: IF node splits the flow on the rating threshold you set.

nodes.label: Happy → Google
nodes.copy: A direct link to your public review page — friction at zero.

nodes.label: Unhappy → Private Inbox
nodes.copy: Manager gets the alert; the patient gets a quiet, human reply.

nodes.label: Log to Dashboard
nodes.copy: Every signal feeds the reputation chart — trends visible weekly.

outcomes.label: More Google reviews
outcomes.copy: Happy patients move down a frictionless path to the public page.

outcomes.label: Bad feedback caught early
outcomes.copy: Concerns land in your inbox first, not on a 1-star review.

outcomes.label: Reputation dashboard
outcomes.copy: Trend lines per provider, per location, per week — all in view.

outcomes.label: Patient sentiment loop
outcomes.copy: Every visit closes with a signal you can act on, not a guess.

eligibilityBot.lede: Verifies coverage before the appointment — clearinghouse → CRM → front-desk dashboard, all in

before: Staff on hold with insurers, one call at a time.

Copays misquoted, claims rejected later.
Eligibility checked the day of, if at all.
after: Coverage verified the moment the slot is booked.

eligibilityBot.howTitle: Nine nodes — booked to verified, in seconds.

nodes.label: Appointment Booked
nodes.copy: Trigger fires the moment a slot is reserved in the scheduler.

nodes.label: Pull CRM Data
nodes.copy: Patient demographics and insurance pulled from the system of record.

nodes.label: Format Request
nodes.copy: The payload is shaped into the clearinghouse-ready format.

nodes.label: Send to Clearinghouse
nodes.copy: Eligibility check goes out — typically resolves in under thirty seconds.

nodes.label: Receive Response
nodes.copy: Raw response is captured, time-stamped, and stored.

nodes.label: Parse Coverage
nodes.copy: Coverage, copay, deductible, and policy status are extracted.

nodes.label: Flag Issues
nodes.copy: Inactive plans, mismatches, and missing data route to review.

nodes.label: Push to Dashboard
nodes.copy: Results land in the front-desk view, sorted by appointment time.

nodes.label: Notify Staff
nodes.copy: Only flagged cases page a human — clean checks stay quiet.

outcomes.label: Coverage verified early

outcomes.label: Copay clarity
outcomes.copy: Patients arrive knowing what they owe — no counter surprises.

outcomes.label: Issues caught early
outcomes.copy: Inactive plans escalate days before the visit, not minutes.

outcomes.label: No more hold music
outcomes.copy: Staff spend their hours on patients, not on insurance lines.

before: Leads land at midnight, replied to next afternoon.

nodes.label: Greet & Capture

nodes.copy: Lead record lands in your CRM with the full transcript attached.

nodes.label: Notify & Confirm
nodes.copy: Staff alert fires; patient gets a branded confirmation in seconds.

outcomes.label: 24/7 lead capture
outcomes.copy: Inquiries handled in real time — weekends and after-hours included.

outcomes.label: Scoped, safe answers
outcomes.copy: The bot only speaks from your sanctioned content — never invents.

outcomes.label: Auto-booked visits
outcomes.copy: Qualified leads pick a slot inside the chat, no callback needed.

outcomes.label: CRM-fed pipeline
outcomes.copy: Every conversation lands tagged, transcribed, and ready to action.

gptChatbot.setupIntro: Three steps, ~75 minutes total. No code. Your GPT key, knowledge base, scheduler, and CRM all stay exactly where they are.

setupSteps.title: Import the spec
setupSteps.copy: Drop the N8N JSON into your instance — every node is labelled.

setupSteps.title: Configure & connect
setupSteps.copy: GPT key, knowledge base, scheduler, and CRM — credentials and prompts.

setupSteps.title: Pilot & switch on
setupSteps.copy: Soft-launch on a hidden page, then drop the widget on your homepage.

gptChatbot.complianceText: Clinical questions auto-escalate to a human and the bot never reads from the chart. Safe to deploy without a BAA.
gptChatbot.ctaText: Drop the workflow into your N8N instance this afternoon. We'll wire up the GPT scope, scheduler, and CRM on a free 30-minute call.

socialAutoPoster.lede: A daily content drip across LinkedIn, Instagram, and X — sourced from your blog, captioned on-brand,
socialAutoPoster.shiftTitle: From sporadic posts to a daily drip.
before: Posting cadence drifts whenever the week gets busy.
Manual reformatting for every channel, every time.
Off-brand captions slip through under deadline.
No clean record of what shipped, or when.
after: A daily drip across LinkedIn, Instagram, and X.
Captions on-brand, sourced from your own content.
Brand voice check before anything publishes.
Every post logged with engagement, in one report.
socialAutoPoster.howTitle: Nine nodes — content in, posts out.

nodes.label: Daily Cron Trigger
nodes.copy: Fires once a day at the time your audience is most active.

nodes.label: Pull Source Content
nodes.copy: Latest blog post or RSS item is pulled in as the day's anchor.

nodes.label: GPT Generate Caption
nodes.copy: On-brand captions written in your voice, tuned per platform.

nodes.label: Generate / Select Image
nodes.copy: A matching image is generated or selected from your library.

nodes.label: Brand Voice Check
nodes.copy: Tone, claims, and banned phrases are screened before publish.

nodes.label: Format Per Platform
nodes.copy: LinkedIn long-form, IG square, X short — formatted automatically.

nodes.label: Check Calendar
nodes.copy: Workflow checks your content calendar to avoid double-posts.

nodes.label: Schedule & Post
nodes.copy: Posts go live, or land scheduled in your social tool of choice.

nodes.label: Log Post & Report
nodes.copy: Every shipment is logged — weekly digest lands in your inbox.

outcomes.label: Daily multi-channel posts
outcomes.copy: LinkedIn, Instagram, and X kept fed without a manual scramble.

outcomes.label: On-brand, every time
outcomes.copy: Captions sourced from your own content — no generic filler.

outcomes.label: No calendar clashes
outcomes.copy: Workflow respects your existing content plan and campaigns.

outcomes.label: Reporting baked in
outcomes.copy: Weekly digest shows what shipped, where, and how it performed.

socialAutoPoster.setupIntro: Three steps, ~50 minutes total. No code. Your blog, GPT key, social tools, and brand guide stay exactly where they are.

setupSteps.title: Import the spec
setupSteps.copy: Drop the N8N JSON into your instance — every node is labelled.

setupSteps.title: Connect channels
setupSteps.copy: Content source, GPT key, social tools, and brand guide — all in.

setupSteps.title: Pilot & switch on
setupSteps.copy: Run a 48-hour draft-only pass, then flip publishing live.

socialAutoPoster.complianceTitle: PHI-free — content only, no patient data.
socialAutoPoster.complianceText: The workflow reads your public blog and ships public posts. No chart, no scheduler, no patient identifiers. Safe to deploy without a BAA.
socialAutoPoster.ctaText: Drop the workflow into your N8N instance this afternoon. We'll wire up your blog, GPT key, and social channels on a free 30-minute call.
